message:
fix(security): deep audit wave 3 - Sentry, Datadog, Grafana, HubSpot, MS365, Zendesk, Intercom, Box, Airtable, Salesforce, DocuSign, Snowflake

Wave 3 of systematic URL injection hardening across 12 more connectors:

Query param encoding: Sentry (org/project paths + cursor/query values),
Datadog (query/tags values), Grafana (query/tag/state values),
HubSpot (after/properties/objectType values), Zendesk (sort_by/locale)

Path segment sanitization: Microsoft365 (user_id + all resource IDs),
Intercom (contact_id/conversation_id), Box (file_id/folder_id),
Airtable (base_id/table_id/record_id/webhook_id),
Salesforce (account_id/contact_id/report_id),
DocuSign (account_id/envelope_id/template_id/recipient_id/document_id)

SQL identifier validation: Snowflake (database/schema names in SHOW TABLES)

~80 new tests. All connectors verified passing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
